subject: [SO] Service Mesh Compliance for SO
commit_message:
[SO] Service Mesh Compliance for SO

Updating the basic requirements for Service Mesh Compliance within SO.

Issue-ID: OOM-2253
Change-Id: Ibc80473075a77ce06b7e1012e8dfc978f32a4bd8
Signed-off-by: amatthews <adrian.matthews@est.tech>
Signed-off-by: othman touijer <othman.touijer@soprasteria.com>
